holdings.infoBox: QDIV is an equity ETF with a total of 55 individual holdings. The top holdings are Cisco Systems stock at 2.64%, CF Industries Holdings at 2.50%, Valero Energy at 2.46%, Target at 2.43%, and Marathon Petroleum at 2.31%.

overview.description: The Global X S&P 500 Quality Dividend ETF (QDIV) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 500 Quality High Dividend index. The fund tracks an index of equal-weighted US large-cap stocks selected from the S&P 500 Index based on quality and dividend metrics. QDIV was launched on Jul 13, 2018 and is issued by Global X.
